=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Autognome — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Autognome — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Autognome — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Autognome — Armored Tank HP: 41/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Autognome — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Autognome — Armored Tank HP: 21/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Autognome — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 9 damage. Autognome — Armored Tank HP: 12/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Autognome — Armored Tank's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Autognome — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Autognome — Armored Tank.
→ Autognome — Armored Tank healed for 7 HP. HP: 19/59
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Autognome — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Autognome — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
